channel.title: MLAIA Blog — AI & Data Science Insights
channel.description: Technical insights on machine learning, signal processing, medical AI, LLMs, and business intelligence from the MLAIA team.

item.title: Wait, The World's Fastest AI Supercomputers Run on Something Called "Slurm"?
item.dc:creator: Dr. Yochai Edlitz
item.description: A deep dive into Slurm — the Simple Linux Utility for Resource Management — the job scheduler powering the world's most advanced AI compute clusters including those at OpenAI, Meta, Google, and leading national labs.

item.title: Transforming Sales with AI: A Success Story with Israel's Leading Communication Company
item.dc:creator: Dr. Yochai Edlitz
item.description: How MLAIA applied machine learning across the full sales pipeline for Israel's leading telecom company — from lead scoring and churn prediction to AI-assisted call center optimization — driving measurable ROI.

item.title: Harness Your Data's Potential with Large Language Models (LLMs)
item.dc:creator: Dr. Yochai Edlitz
item.description: How large language models unlock hidden value from unstructured text, documents, and knowledge bases. A practical look at fine-tuning, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and enterprise LLM deployment for customer support, sales intelligence, and business automation.

item.title: Supercharging Machine Learning Models with Classical Digital Signal Processing
item.dc:creator: Dr. Yochai Edlitz
item.description: Why combining classical DSP (Fourier transforms, digital filters, wavelets) with modern deep learning produces superior real-time signal intelligence. Practical hybrid DSP-ML architectures applied to industrial, defense, and healthcare sensor data.

item.title: Unleashing the Power of Graphs for Machine Learning
item.dc:creator: Dr. Yochai Edlitz
item.description: Graph neural networks (GNNs) are transforming machine learning across social network analysis, bioinformatics, fraud detection, and drug discovery. An exploration of how graph-based models reveal structure in complex, interconnected data.

item.title: Expertise Without Boundaries: Affordable AI and ML Development
item.dc:creator: Dr. Yochai Edlitz
item.description: How the outsourced AI consulting model delivers senior ML expertise to startups and enterprises without the cost and timeline of full-time hiring. Why MLAIA's approach enables faster iteration, lower overhead, and access to PhD-level talent on demand.
